/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/StellarExplorer.dir/StellarExplorer_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StellarExplorer.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StellarExplorer.dir/src/mainwindow.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StellarExplorer.dir/src/filetab.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StellarExplorer.dir/src/breadcrumbs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StellarExplorer.dir/src/fileopworker.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StellarExplorer.dir/src/configdialog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/StellarExplorer.dir/src/utils.cpp.o -o StellarExplorer  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Widgets.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Gui.so.5.15.13 /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libQt5Core.so.5.15.13
